takeaways: Cross-orbit structure already appears in the orbital-only view, but traffic and debris features make it richer and closer to the primary result.
The regime structure survives without mission/operator context, so the main finding is not just metadata clustering.
The main fragility patterns still appear when stewardship proxy inputs are removed, which makes the orbital-condition claim more defensible.
At least part of the regime structure survives on direct and derived features alone, without the proxy-heavy inputs.
